title: The Data Heist
intro: You are The Mastermind. Your target is MegaCorp and their illegal Project OMNI. Authenticate to access the encrypted mastermind terminal and begin the operation.
emailHelper: // Your mission results will be linked to this ID.
passwordError: Password must be at least 8 characters.

about.title: Operation OMNI
paragraphs: Operation OMNI is a narrative driven digital escape room set in 2003, where you step into the role of the Mastermind, a specialist strategist brought in to expose Project OMNI, an illegal AI system hidden inside the world's most powerful technology conglomerate, MegaCorp.
Using a fragile mirrored feed from a compromised executive desktop, you must investigate files, trace hidden connections, and build a case before MegaCorp's security systems detect the breach.

Across five sequential operations, you will apply core data skills: identifying trustworthy evidence, inspecting metadata and lineage, interpreting patterns, making ethical disclosure choices, and connecting findings to operational strategy.
Designed for students in Information Technology, Data Science, Business Analytics, and Data Engineering, Operation OMNI transforms data literacy into a high-stakes interactive experience.
